name: Steel Round Metal Mesh Outdoor Patio Bistro Table Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a charming outdoor retreat with this Round Metal Mesh Patio Bistro Table from Room Essentials™. This stylish bistro table has a round silhouette with a spacious mesh tabletop, making it ideal for seating guests for casual get-togethers. Boasting a powder-coated frame with a rust-resistant finish to help withstand the elements, the foldable bistro table also has an umbrella hole to help provide a little shade when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
